intro:
Monster Meals is a chaotic and frantic cooking game
set in a food truck full of hungry monsters.
Cook up exotic creatures in local co-op.
description:
Dive into the world of monster cuisine!
You take on the role of an adorable monster chef on a unique culinary journey. With a food truck as your mobile base, travel through diverse locations from deserts to big cities serving up meals to monstrous customers.


Watch out, you might end up as the meal!
Get ready for a thrilling culinary experience where time is your biggest enemy! With impatient customers waiting, be quick or you might end up on the menu.


Play solo or in local co-op!
Work as a team to serve your demanding customers as quickly as possible! Play in local co-op mode, but don’t take too long… or you might end up as the ingredient! (Local multiplayer requires a controller.)


Hunt animals to use in your recipes!
Prepare meals that defy conventional standards, using exotic creatures from each location. Hunt rats on the street, pigeons in the square, or cockroaches in the sewers!


Different cooking methods and combinations!
With skill and precision, slice, fry, roast, and cook these bizarre ingredients in your mobile kitchen, equipped with various utensils and equipment.


Upgrade your Food Truck!
As you progress through the levels, your food truck evolves, unlocking new equipment for increasingly difficult challenges. There are 20 levels across 4 distinct locations, each with its own immersive atmosphere and customizable vehicle.


Survive the madness!
Face increasingly difficult days in the new Survival Mode, fully playable solo or with up to 2 chefs in local co-op. Upgrade your truck, handle the mounting pressure, and try to reach retirement together!
